notes: Water-themed Paw Patrol compilation: a double-length special plus single-length episodes from a couple of seasons. Originally misrouted as a movie ('Pups Save Puplantis (2019)') with the four episodes dumped into Extras/, because the size-similarity routing test rejected the 12-min episodes (0.52x the 23-min special). Routing ground truth is verified (TV disc); per-episode identity not yet labeled. Sizes/durations recovered via ffprobe; the special's raw output filename was lost in the rename (it is now the .mkv at the movie folder root). makemkv reported 7 titles; titles 5 and 6 failed to save during the rip.
